name: String, short name (e.g., Multi-threaded Concurrency and Synchronization Mechanism Comprehensive Test Suite)
description: String, natural language description of the overall process purpose and flow
tags: Tag array, e.g., concurrency-demo, pipeline, caching, risk-calculation
overallConcurrencyModel: Overview of the top-level concurrency model; describe if it is a composite process

subProcesses.name: Sub-process name (e.g., Event-Driven Aggregation)
subProcesses.description: What this sub-process does and what problem it solves
subProcesses.concurrencyModel: Specific concurrency model name, e.g., Pub/Sub + CountDownLatch

threads.name: Thread name (e.g., main, Coordinator-Worker)
threads.summary: Main operation steps of this thread

components.name: Custom component class name (e.g., WorkerCoordinator)
components.role: Coordinator / Aggregator / Event Bus / Cache / Logger ...

interactions.detail: Interaction detail, e.g., publish worker.result.computed event via EventBus, triggering async callback

subProcesses.input: Input of the sub-process (if any, e.g., 3 concurrent computation tasks)
subProcesses.output: Output or observable effect of the sub-process (e.g., aggregated result array and audit log)
preconditions: Precondition 1 (e.g., EventBus must be configured for async dispatch mode)
postconditions: Postcondition 1 (e.g., all task results must be written to Aggregator, and the main thread is unblocked)
tags: Sub-process specific tags, e.g., async-dispatch, batching
